title: UNREGISTERED_AGENT_OUTPUT event payload
description: Error event emitted when an artifact-emit attempt references an unregistered or inactive agent_id. Governance rationale: Invariant 4 (Reconstructability) — every failure path produces a ledger event. No silent failures.

artifact_type.description: Type of artifact whose emission was rejected (e.g., Observation, Hypothesis).

rejection_reason.description: Structured rejection reason. NOT_REGISTERED: no AgentIdentity for this agent_id. SUSPENDED/REVOKED: agent exists but status forbids output. SESSION_MISMATCH: agent registered in a different session.
